texto: You really pay attention to things, don’t you?” “Just with people I care about,” he said with a smile, “I think I get that from my mother. She was a really kind and giving person from what I remember, and she used to tell me, ‘Don’t just listen to people, hear them.’ I never forgot that.” “Wow,” I responded, “That’s so true. How many people really hear what we say?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jackie Pilossoph que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “You really pay attention to things, don’t you?” “Just with people I care about,” he said with a s…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, listening, love, com foco em love.
